chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 687 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.2847/2023 (Ex.A) 3. For hearing of main case 13-10-2025 None present for the Petitioners nor any intimation is received. Mr. Abdul Raheem Mahar, Advocate present in Court submits that the Petitioners have taken away the file from him. Perusal of the record reflects that the instant Petition was presented in the office on 10-04-2023 and it was fixed in Court on a single date viz. 17-05-2023 when a brief was held on behalf of the Counsel for the petitioners. Thereafter no such concrete efforts were made either by the Petitioners or their Counsel to get the matter fixed in Court, though it is pending without any useful progress. The deliberate absence on the part of the Petitioners and their Counsel prima facie suggests that either the purpose of filing instant Petition has been served or they have lost interest to pursue the same. Accordingly, the same is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI
